message:
style(packs): polish Pack API with const fn and doc formatting

Minor API and documentation improvements for the Pack struct:

- Make Pack::new() a const fn
  - Allows compile-time pack construction if all inputs are const
  - No runtime cost, purely a capability expansion
  - All fields being initialized are already compatible with const context

- Format doc comments with proper rustdoc backticks
  - `RegexSet` instead of RegexSet in doc comments
  - `safe_regex_set` field name references in backticks
  - Improves rendering in generated documentation

No functional changes. This is purely API polish and documentation formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
